feat.name: Blade Brake
feat.requirement: You are wielding a melee weapon and are within reach of a hard surface
feat.text: You plow your weapon into a floor, wall, or another sturdy surface, anchoring yourself in place. If you would be moved 20 feet or more, you are moved only 5 feet. Otherwise, you don’t move at all.

traits.name: Fighter
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the fighter class.

traits.name: Manipulate
traits.text: You must physically manipulate an item or make gestures to use an action with this trait. Creatures without a suitable appendage can’t perform actions with this trait. Manipulate actions often trigger reactions.

feat.trigger: You would be moved by a forced movement effect
